g.text: Event folder — everything about this trip lives here
1. _Originals/ Camera files dumped here on shoot day. Never modified.
2. _Selects/ Pick your best shots — could be done years later. No editing yet.
3. _Edits/ Retouched, color-graded, cropped versions of selects.
4. _Exports/ Final sized-for-purpose outputs: web, print, social, video.
Underscore prefix (_) sorts these folders to the top in Finder/Explorer,
above any stray files. You see the workflow folders first.
An event with only originals = not yet curated (most of your archive).
An event with _Selects = partially processed. With _Exports = complete.
